title: taraxacum habile
intro: Taraxacum habile, also known as the common dandelion, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the sunflower family. The medicinal properties of Taraxacum habile include its use as a diuretic, helping to reduce water retention and alleviate symptoms of urinary tract infections. The health benefits associated with this plant include its ability to support liver function, lower blood pressure, and act as an antioxidant. Taraxacum habile can be prepared into various herbal products, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, making it a versatile and easily accessible remedy.
